compressed_prompt: Draft a humorous teen post for 'Buena Onda' restaurant, focusing on its Argentinian cuisine. Use markdown to *highlight* key sections. Include 'Argentinian' in the post.
response:
# 🇦🇷 POV: You Just Discovered *Buena Onda* and Your Life Will Never Be the Same

---

Okay so *hear me out* because I need to talk about something **extremely important** 👇

You know how you've been eating the same sad lunch for like **the past 47 school days**? Yeah. That ends NOW bestie. 🙅‍♀️

---

## Why *Buena Onda* Just Became My New Personality ✨

- 🥩 The **Argentinian empanadas** hit different and I genuinely cannot explain it to you scientifically
- The chimichurri sauce?? *I would put it on literally everything including my homework*
- My mom asked why I was crying and I had to explain it was just **really good steak** 😭

---

## Real Things I Said At *Buena Onda* This Week:

> *"I'm not leaving"* - me, three hours ago
> *"This is Argentinian culture and I respect it deeply"* - also me, on my fourth empanada

---

### The Vibe Check ✅

**Buena Onda** literally translates to *"good vibes"* and honestly?? The food understood the assignment COMPLETELY 🎯

No notes. Zero notes. Only *more empanadas.*

**Go. Right now. I'm serious. Why are you still reading this?** 🏃‍♀️💨
